issue.title: Add Docker support for isolated ROS smoke testing

comment.body:
> > @Ma7moud3ly testing now, but please don't force push changes over top of my commits. It makes understanding what you changed very difficult. I will recreate my original commit and commit your changes on top of it.
> 
> why don't you check compare 🤔 https://github.com/tekkura/sr-android/compare/3060df34731fbf8edd4d67184a198eca9c76f80e..9008350bd9bbe411f873e91504cc982597d983b6

@Ma7moud3ly I'm not saying I cannot compare them. You overwrote shared history. This is not an acceptable collaborative workflow. Please refrain from doing it in the future.
